notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Zack Gelof scores. Nick Kurtz to 2nd. Nick Kurtz advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Jo Adell.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Zack Gelof scores. Nick Kurtz to 2nd. Nick Kurtz advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Jo Adell.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Jack Perkins. Jose Siri scores. Wade Meckler to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Denzer Guzman.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Oswald Peraza called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Joey Meneses GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joey Meneses grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Christian Moore to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Tyler Soderstrom to 3rd. Jonah Heim out at 2nd. Joey Meneses out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Joey Meneses grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Christian Moore to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Tyler Soderstrom to 3rd. Jonah Heim out at 2nd. Joey Meneses out at 1st.
